title: Supporting all readers in secondary school
body: "There is one training pathway suitable for all secondary staff and another for secondary school leaders.  The course can be completed in around an hour, either individually or in groups. Both pathways include:   a series of videos for:  all secondary school staff  school leaders   guidance and workbook for reflecting and making notes   The training outlines theory and research findings, and provides practical strategies that can be implemented in any secondary classroom.  The course was developed for DfE by Professor Jessie Ricketts of Royal Holloway, University of London. It was created in collaboration with teachers and school leaders with expertise in reading and secondary contexts. "

taxons.title: Secondary curriculum, key stage 3 and key stage 4 (GCSEs)
